Part.Source:
Event Start
LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &tmpNfeItmCod = &partmpNfeItmCod padraousuario.Call('L', '#SALVARPROXIMPORTACOMPRA#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &padObs, &PadDtaMod) if substr(&padObs , 1, 1) = '1' &SalvarAvancar = true Else &SalvarAvancar = false Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
UnnamedTable5.Height = 50 aa.Height = 370 UnnamedTable13.Width = 130 UnnamedTable19.Width = 130 &tmpPedQtdTrib.Visible = False &tmpUndTrib.Visible = False &tmpEntCFOP.Visible = False &tmpCFOP.Visible = False &tmpNfeOriCod.Visible = False &tmpMarCodNom.Visible = False &tmpProOriRef.Visible = False &tmpProOriNom.Visible = False &tmpProSolLot.Visible = False &tmpProCod.Visible = False &tmpProGraCod.Visible = False &tmpNcmCEST.Visible = False &erptmpNcmCEST.Visible = False &tmpCBenef.Visible = False &tmpNFeCod.Visible = False &EmpCod.Visible = False
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
&tmpProRef.SetFocus()
txtProduto.Caption = '' Do 'LoadTemporaria' Do 'LoadProdutoERP' do 'multiplicador' do 'colorize'
EndEvent
Event 'DoItemAnterior'
Do 'GetAnteriorItem' if &UlttmpNfeItmCod <> &tmpNFeItmCod Do 'LoadTemporaria' Do 'LoadProdutoERP' do 'multiplicador' do 'colorize' &tmpProRef.SetFocus() Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoProximoItem'
do 'GetProximoItem' if &UlttmpNfeItmCod <> &tmpNFeItmCod Do 'LoadTemporaria' Do 'LoadProdutoERP' do 'multiplicador' do 'colorize' &tmpProRef.SetFocus() Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Enter
do 'Gravar'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoAdd'
&sdtGravaProduto.ProRef = '' &sdtGravaProduto.tmpNfeItmCod = &tmpNfeItmCod &sdtGravaProduto.tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod &sdtGravaProduto.ForCNPJ = &ForCNPJ &sdtGravaProduto.tmpProForCod = &tmpProForCod &sdtGravaProduto.ProTipDef = Definicao.SERVICO &sdtGravaProduto.ProNom = &tmpProNom &sdtGravaProduto.ProNcmCod = &tmpNcmCod &sdtGravaProduto.ProBar = retornaSoNumeros.Udp(&tmpNfeProBar) &sdtGravaProduto.ProTribNac = &tmpProForCod RetornaPrimeiraEmbalagemUnidade.call(&EmpCod, &tmpUnd, &EmbCod) &sdtGravaProduto.ProEmbCod = &EmbCod If &tmpProSolLot = SolicitarLote.SIM_CONTROLAR &sdtGravaProduto.ProSolLot = solicitarLote.SIM_CONTROLAR EndIf &sdtGravaProduto.IsPoupop = true &WebSession.Set('DADOSDEFAUT_PRODUTO', &sdtGravaProduto.ToXml())
Produtos.Popup('RETURN', TrnMode.Insert, &EmpCod, 0, &tmpProRef) &tmpProRef.SetFocus()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'F3Gravar'
3 do 'Gravar'
EndEvent
Event &tmpProRef.IsValid
Do 'LoadProdutoERP' do 'colorize'
EndEvent
Event &MaisCodigos.Click
wpCodigoCaixas.call(&Context.EmpCod, &tmpProCod, 1, '') refresh
EndEvent
Event &tmpProQtdCmpEmb.IsValid
do 'Multiplicador'
EndEvent
Event &QtdMultiplicada.IsValid
Do case Case &QtdMultiplicada > &tmpPedQtd and &QtdMultiplicada > 0 and &tmpPedQtd > 0 &tmpProQtdCmpEmb = (&QtdMultiplicada / &tmpPedQtd) Case &QtdMultiplicada < &tmpPedQtd and &QtdMultiplicada > 0 and &tmpPedQtd > 0 &tmpProQtdCmpEmb = (&tmpPedQtd / &QtdMultiplicada) &tmpProQtdCmpEmb = (&tmpProQtdCmpEmb*-1) Otherwise &tmpProQtdCmpEmb = &tmpPedQtd EndCase
EndEvent
Sub 'Multiplicador'
Do case Case &tmpProQtdCmpEmb > 0 &QtdMultiplicada = ((&tmpPedQtd * &tmpProQtdCmpEmb)) Case &tmpProQtdCmpEmb < 0 //and &QtdMultiplicada > 0 &QtdMultiplicada = ((&tmpPedQtd / (&tmpProQtdCmpEmb*-1))) Otherwise &QtdMultiplicada = &tmpPedQtd EndCase
EndSub
Sub 'Gravar'
If &RepetidoEanMensagem.IsEmpty() // do 'VerificaCFOP' // If &IsErroCfop = false if &SalvarAvancar = true &padObs = '1' Else &padObs = '0' Endif padraousuario.Call('G', '#SALVARPROXIMPORTACOMPRA#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &padObs, &PadDtaMod)
FornecedorProduto_AtualizaCodBarras.Call(&tmpNFeCod, &EmpCod, &ForCNPJ, &tmpProForCod, &tmpNfeProBar, &tmpProRef, &tmpEntCFOP, &tmpCFOP, &tmpProQtdCmpEmb, &tmpProCod, &tmpEmixCod) AtualizaProduto.call(&EmpCod,&tmpProCod,&tmpNFeCod,&tmpNfeItmCod,&tmpProBar,&erptmpNcmCod,&erptmpNcmCEST ,&ProCatCod, &Context.UserName) //AtualizaVinculoCFOP.call(&tmpCFOP, &EmpCod, &LctCod, &tmpEntCFOP, '') txtStatus.Caption = 'PRODUTO ATUALIZADO COM SUCESSO' txtStatus.ForeColor = RGB(0,160,0)
If &SalvarAvancar = true do 'GetProximoItem' if &UlttmpNfeItmCod <> &tmpNFeItmCod Do 'LoadTemporaria' Do 'LoadProdutoERP' do 'multiplicador' do 'colorize' &tmpProRef.SetFocus() Else return Endif Else return Endif // Else // txtStatus.Caption = 'CFOP INVÁLIDO' // txtStatus.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) // Endif
Else txtProduto.Caption =&RepetidoEanMensagem EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'GetProximoItem'
btnProximoItem.Enabled = 1 btnItemAnterior.Enabled = 1 &UlttmpNfeItmCod = &tmpNfeItmCod For each Order tmpNFeCod,tmpNfeItmCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod Where tmpNfeItmCod > &UlttmpNfeItmCod &tmpNfeItmCod = tmpNfeItmCod
Exit When none btnProximoItem.Enabled = 0 EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'GetAnteriorItem'
btnProximoItem.Enabled = 1 btnItemAnterior.Enabled = 1 &UlttmpNfeItmCod = &tmpNfeItmCod For each Order tmpNFeCod,(tmpNfeItmCod) Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod Where tmpNfeItmCod < &UlttmpNfeItmCod &tmpNfeItmCod = tmpNfeItmCod
Exit When none btnItemAnterior.Enabled = 0 EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'LoadTemporaria'
For each Order tmpNFeCod,tmpNfeItmCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod Where tmpNfeItmCod = &tmpNfeItmCod
&LctCod = tmpLctCod
if tmpPedCliCnpj.IsEmpty() &ForCNPJ = tmpPedCliCpf Else &ForCNPJ = tmpPedCliCnpj EndIF
&tmpEmixCod = tmpEmixCod &tmpProCod = tmpProCod &tmpProGraCod = tmpProGraCod &tmpProRef = tmpProRef &tmpProNom = tmpProNom &tmpProOriRef = tmpProOriRef &tmpProOriNom = tmpProOriNom &tmpEntCFOP = tmpEntCFOP &tmpProForCod = tmpProForCod &tmpProCatCod = tmpProCatCod &tmpNfeProDadAdi = tmpNfeProDadAdi &tmpNcmCod = tmpNcmCod &tmpNcmCEST = tmpNcmCEST &tmpMarCodNom = tmpMarCodNom &tmpCFOP = tmpCFOP &tmpUnd = tmpUnd &tmpProQtdCmpEmb = tmpProQtdCmpEmb &tmpProSolLot = tmpProSolLot &tmpNfeOriCod = tmpNfeOriCod &tmpNfeSitCod = val(tmpNfeSitCod) &tmpPedQtd = tmpPedQtd &tmpPedQtdFat = tmpPedQtdFat &tmpPedVlrUnt = tmpPedVlrUnt &tmpPedVlrDsc = tmpPedVlrDsc &tmpPedVlrUntNov = tmpPedVlrUntNov &tmpPedVlrTotNov = tmpPedVlrTotNov &tmpProVlrFrt = tmpProVlrFrt &tmpPedVlrTot = tmpPedVlrTot &tmpProBasVlrIcm = tmpProBasVlrIcm &tmpProPerIcm = tmpProPerIcm &tmpProVlrIcm = tmpProVlrIcm &tmpProPerRedIcm = tmpProPerRedIcm &tmpNfeProTaxMvaSt = tmpNfeProTaxMvaSt &tmpProPerRedIcmSt = tmpProPerRedIcmSt &tmpProBasVlrIcmSt = tmpProBasVlrIcmSt &tmpProPerIcmSt = tmpProPerIcmSt &tmpProVlrIcmSt = tmpProVlrIcmSt &tmpProBasVlrIpi = tmpProBasVlrIpi &tmpProPerIpi = tmpProPerIpi &tmpProVlrIpi = tmpProVlrIpi &tmpProPerDif = tmpProPerDif &tmpProVlrDif = tmpProVlrDif &tmpNfeCstPIS = tmpNfeCstPIS &tmpNfeCstIpi = tmpNfeCstIpi &tmpProPerPIS = tmpProPerPIS &tmpProVlrPIS = tmpProVlrPIS &tmpNfeCstCofins = tmpNfeCstCofins &tmpProPerCOFINS = tmpProPerCOFINS &tmpProVlrCOFINS = tmpProVlrCOFINS &tmpProVlrApxImp = tmpProVlrApxImp &tmpNfeProBar = tmpNfeProBar &tmpProBar = tmpProBar
&tmpCBenef = tmpCBenef
&tmpPedQtdTrib = tmpPedQtdTrib &tmpUndTrib = tmpUndTrib
&tmpProTaxFCPIcmsSt = tmpProTaxFCPIcmsSt &tmpProBasFCPIcmsSt = tmpProBasFCPIcmsSt &tmpProVlrFCPIcmsSt = tmpProVlrFCPIcmsSt Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'colorize'
Do Case CAse &tmpNcmCod <> &erptmpNcmCod &tmpNcmCod.ForeColor = RGB(200, 150, 0) Case &tmpNcmCod = &erptmpNcmCod &tmpNcmCod.ForeColor = RGB(0, 150, 0) Otherwise &tmpNcmCod.ForeColor = RGB(200, 0, 0) EndCase
// Do Case // CAse &tmpNfeProBar <> &tmpProBar // &tmpNfeProBar.ForeColor = RGB(200, 150, 0) // Case &tmpNfeProBar = &tmpProBar // &tmpNfeProBar.ForeColor = RGB(0, 150, 0) // Otherwise // &tmpNfeProBar.ForeColor = RGB(200, 0, 0) // EndCase
EndSub
Sub 'LoadProdutoERP'
RetornaProdutoReferencia.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &tmpProRef, &tmpProCod, &tmpProGraCod, &ErptmpProNom, &IsAchouProduto, &ProReqVlr, &ProReqQtd, &ProBarQtd, &MensagemErro)
For each Order EmpCod,ProCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where ProCod = &tmpProCod &tmpProRef = ProRef &tmpProBar = ProBar &erptmpNcmCod = NcmCod &ProCatCod = ProCatCod &erptmpNcmCEST = str(ProNcmCest)
exit EndFor
&MaisCodigos = &tmpProRef.Trim() + ' | ' + trim(&tmpProBar)
For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, ProBarRef Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &tmpProCod Where ProGraCod = 1 Where ProBarTip = 'A' Or ProBarTip = 'O' &OutrosCodigosMensagem += ' | ' + trim(ProBarRef) EndFor
&MaisCodigos += &OutrosCodigosMensagem
EndSub
//Event &tmpProBar.IsValid // // txtProduto.Caption = '' // If not &tmpProBar.IsEmpty() // ValidaCodigoReferenciaRepetido.Call(&EmpCod,&tmpProCod, 1, &tmpProBar, &RepetidoEanMensagem) // If (not &RepetidoEanMensagem.IsEmpty()) and (not &tmpProBar.IsEmpty()) // txtProduto.Caption = &RepetidoEanMensagem // Endif // EndIF // //EndEvent
//Sub 'VerificaCFOP' // // &IsErroCfop = false // RetornaSoNumeros.Call(&tmpEntCFOP, &tmpEntCFOP) // &CfoCod = Substr(&tmpEntCFOP, 1, 1) + '.' + Substr(&tmpEntCFOP, 2, 3) // // For Each Order CfoCod // Where CfoCod = &CfoCod // // Exit // When none // &IsErroCfop = true // EndFor // //EndSub
